content: Hi, I just ordered a Beacon Mini from your site. Did it go through?
Welcome! Yes, order BX-4471 for one Beacon Mini is confirmed and ships within two business days to 14 Maple Street, Portstead.
Great. Is setup hard? I am not technical at all.
Under ten minutes for most people. Plug it in, open the Beacon app, and it walks you through wifi.
It arrived and setup worked, but it keeps dropping off wifi every few hours.
Sorry about that. Which firmware are you on? The app shows it under Device Info.
Says 2.3.9.
That explains it. The wifi drop issue is fixed in firmware 2.4.1. I have queued the update, it installs within the hour.
Update done, stable all day now. Thanks.
Great to hear. Firmware 2.4.1 also speeds up sensor pairing a little.
Bad news, my dog chewed the power cable. Hub fine, cable dead. Her name is Pixel and she shows zero remorse.
Glad Pixel is okay. A replacement cable is ordered and ships today to Maple Street.
Also the camera tripod I bought arrived with a bent leg. I would rather have a refund than a replacement.
Done. A refund of 62.50 is issued to your original payment method, no need to send the tripod back.
Refund landed, thanks. Also my partner Dana says hello, she loves the sunset light scene.
Hello to Dana! You can invite her as a second app user under Settings, Household if she wants control too.
Did that, works. Big news, I am moving at the end of the month.
Congrats! Tell me the new address when you have it and I will set it as your default for shipping.
Move is done. New address is 88 Harbor Lane, Portstead. Use that for everything from now on.
Updated. Your default shipping address is now 88 Harbor Lane, Portstead, replacing Maple Street.
The hub reconnected at the new place in two minutes, painless.
Smooth. Your schedules and scenes carried over automatically since they live on the hub.
One preference: no more phone call follow ups from support please. Email only.
Set. Contact preference is now email only, no phone calls, across support and order updates.
Perfect. And how long is my warranty? Never checked.
Two years from delivery, so your Beacon Mini is covered until February 2028. Chewed cables excluded, Pixel knows why.
Fair. Pixel accepts the terms. Talk soon.
Terms acknowledged by all parties. Enjoy the new place, and greetings to Dana.
